title: The European Parliament is building its own AI to stop MEPs pasting draft laws into ChatGPT
summary: The Parliament has already shown it to staff at workshops, one of which promised to help them “work smarter and faster.” The rules have not kept up. The Parliament’s press service said the models on offer are under review.
caption: output/2026-07-20/the-european-parliament-is-building-its-own-ai-to-stop-meps-pasting-dr.txt
